name: @firstpick/pi-skill-tech-debt-tracker
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill when identifying, categorizing, prioritizing, or planning technical debt work, debt sprints, cleanup backlogs, TODO consolidation, or long-term maintainability risks. Tracks debt with severity/effort.
description_zh: 代理在识别、分类、优先排序或规划技术债务工作、债务冲刺、清理积压、TODO 合并或长期可维护性风险时应调用此技能。使用严重性/工作量跟踪债务
